name: Horatio Alger Canadian Scholarship
description: Undergraduate scholarships awarded to full-time grade 11 high school students who have demonstrated integrity and perseverance in overcoming adversity, a commitment to pursue a post-secondary education, a desire to contribute to society, and a good academic record.

name: Vocational & Technical Scholarship
description: For students pursuing a certificate or diploma, helping them achieve their career aspirations and fulfill their potential.

name: RBC Ignite Scholarship
description: Scholarships to help youth access new skills and training for job-ready certifications, skills-building courses, and hands-on training.

name: RBC Elevate Scholarship
description: Scholarships to help individuals between 17-29 attend post-secondary education programs in Canada for at least two years.

name: RBC Reimagine Scholarship
description: Scholarships for adult learners aged 25 or older seeking upskilling or reskilling opportunities to grow in their current career or transition into a new field.

name: Building Brighter Futures: Bursaries and Scholarships
description: Financial support for First Nations, Inuit, and Métis students for full and part-time studies in college, university, skilled trades, apprenticeships, and technology programs.

name: President's Admission Scholarship
description: High School Prestige Awards for high achieving entering students. The criteria for these awards vary but always include academic excellence and accomplishments outside the classroom.

name: Entrance Bursary
description: Designed to provide financial support to newly admitted students to an Undergraduate Bachelor's degree program in any discipline of study.

name: In-Course Bursary
description: Concordia offers need-based In-Course Bursaries to returning Bachelor's students in the Fall semester.
